name: SOT3 Refinery Runtime Owner

citations.evidenceRole: REQUIRED_STAGE_CHAIN and RefineryEngine runtime symbol evidence

claimBoundary: ACCEPTED_REVIEW_EVIDENCE only. RefineryEngine and its REQUIRED_STAGE_CHAIN exist as bounded local-ready package runtime that prepares SourceEnvelope input into a RefineryPacket through a fixed nine-stage deterministic chain. This entry does not claim the Refinery is globally activated, always invoked by any CVF Web or production request path, a provider boundary, publicly exported, or production-ready. Activation into a real product path is governed separately by the SOT3 activation architecture decision and its A1-A5 proof ladder, not by this catalog record.
boundaryCaveat: Does not claim universal activation, provider/live behavior, public export, or production readiness. Local-ready package existence only; wiring into any product request path remains governed by the separate SOT3 activation decision and roadmap.
